meaning: n.(中非和东非地区用小米等制的)非洲酒
examples: Also, S. pombe has prospective biotechnological application in heterologous gene expression.
A majority of the stresses can directly or indirectly induce the reactive oxygen species (ROS) of S. pombe.
Methlotrophic yeast and fission yeast S. pombe have received attention as a good foreign genes expression system.
